tagline: i am not even having a good time
description: Code. Music. Digital Art. Operating in the anti-corruption space while maintaining a daily coding practice.

aboutSkills.val: PHP, JavaScript, jQuery, XHTML, CSS, Bash
CMS, DNS, Mail, Games, Music, Administration

aboutBio: Welcome. I'm Bugfish — software developer and builder with a habit of shipping things that actually work. I've been writing code since 2008. My work spans system tools, web platforms, games, music production, and digital art. Currently part of the anti-corruption space — navigating red tape and bureaucracy while still pushing commits every day.
assessment: Bugfish has been writing code since 2008, and it shows — in the good way: PHP, JavaScript, C#, C++ and even Assembly all answer when he calls. He builds the unglamorous things the internet actually runs on — CMS platforms, DNS tooling, mail servers — then relaxes by producing dark synth tracks and digital art. He self-hosts everything, documents everything, and trusts third-party CDNs about as far as he can throw them. His tagline claims he's not even having a good time, yet the man ships commits daily, which is either discipline or a very productive cry for help. Verdict: a stubborn, versatile builder you want on your side — ideally supplied with coffee and kept at a safe distance from bureaucracy.

counters.label: RESISTANCE SINCE
counters.description: Evading the state and crooked cops
